title: Missing Number — O(n) Time, O(1) Space
description:
An array contains n distinct numbers from the range [0, n] — exactly one number is missing. Return the missing one.

Example: `[3, 0, 1]` is missing 2 (range is 0..3).

**The point**: a Set solution is O(n) time AND O(n) space. Math (`sum 0..n minus sum(arr)`) or XOR gets you to **O(n) time, O(1) space**.
hints: Brute force: for each number 0..n, check if it appears in nums. That's O(n²).
With a Set: O(n) time but O(n) extra space.
Math: the sum 0+1+...+n is n(n+1)/2. Subtract the actual sum to find the gap. O(1) extra space.
